texto: Novelists would do well to remember that when the works of the scholar-historians create doubt in the researcher’s mind, the researcher then turns to literature as a primary source for confirmation or correction. If the truth of a time, a people, a state is not available anywhere else, let it be in the novel. - from Twayne’s US Authors Series: JOHN A WILLIAMS by Gilbert Muller
explicacao: Citação de John A. Williams sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Novelists would do well to remember that when the works of the scholar-historians create doubt in…” articula reflexao, history, literature em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e literature.

texto: ,Bloodlust is like a natural disaster; it has to run its course. I have seen their faces; they are faces out of nightmares—most ordinary—so ordinary that you can’t believe the brains behind them capable of genocide.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John A. Williams: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a inteligencia. O trecho “,Bloodlust is like a natural disaster; it has to run its course. I have seen their faces; they ar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, genocide, racism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: ,Bloodlust is like a natural disaster; it has to run its course. I have seen their faces; they are faces out of nightmares—most ordinary—so ordinary that you can’t believe the brains behind them capable of genocide.

texto: ,It must be pretty awful for a white man to learn that one of the things wrong with this society is that it is not based on dollars directly or alone, but dollars denied men who are black so dollars can go into the pockets of men who are white. It must make white men ponder a kind of weakness that will make them deny work to black men so that work can be done by men who are white.
explicacao: Orientação direta de John A. Williams sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. A afirmação “,It must be pretty awful for a white man to learn that one of the things wrong with this society …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sabedoria, economics, race, útil em momentos de trabalho e race.

texto: The worst kind of tyrant was the one who once had been the victim.
explicacao: Citação de John A. Williams sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The worst kind of tyrant was the one who once had been the victim.” articula reflexao, hypocrisy, tyranny em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como tyranny e tyrant.
